Bash(/tmp/create_rfis2.rb << 'RUBY_SCRIPT'
provider = Pg::Provider.first
user = Pg::User.find_by\(email: 'michael@scientist.com'\)

# Find existing UserRef for this user
user_ref = Pg::UserRef.where\(reference_of_type: 'Pg::User', reference_of_id: user.id\).first

if user_ref.nil?
  puts "No UserRef found, creating one..."
  # Create UserRef from user
  user_ref = Pg::UserRef.create!\(
    reference_of_type: 'Pg::User',
    reference_of_id: user.id,
    fields: {
      email: user.email,
      first_name: user.first_name,
      last_name: user.last_name
    }
  \)
end

puts "Using UserRef ID: #{user_ref.id}"

# Use the first 3 ProviderRfiBuilder records
builders = Pg::ProviderRfiBuilder.limit\(3\).to_a

# Create Commercial RFI - Submitted status
commercial_rfi = Pg::CommercialRfi.create!\(
  provider: provider,
  multipage_form_builder_id: builders[0].id,
  name: "Commercial Due Diligence",
  submitted_at: 30.days.ago,
  submitted_by_ref_id: user_ref.id,
  expired_at: 30.days.from_now
\)
puts "Created Commercial RFI: #{commercial_rfi.id} - Status: #{commercial_rfi.status}"

# Create Compli RFI - Under Evaluation
compli_rfi = Pg::CompliRfi.create!\(
  provider: provider,
  multipage_form_builder_id: builders[1].id,
  name: "COMPLi Assessment",
  submitted_at: 20.days.ago,
  submitted_by_ref_id: user_ref.id,
  evaluation_started_at: 10.days.ago,
  evaluation_started_by_ref_id: user_ref.id,
  expired_at: 60.days.from_now
\)
puts "Created Compli RFI: #{compli_rfi.id} - Status: #{compli_rfi.status}"

# Create Technical RFI - Evaluated \(positively\)
technical_rfi = Pg::TechnicalRfi.create!\(
  provider: provider,
  multipage_form_builder_id: builders[2].id,
  name: "Technical Capabilities Assessment",
  submitted_at: 45.days.ago,
  submitted_by_ref_id: user_ref.id,
  evaluation_started_at: 30.days.ago,
  evaluation_started_by_ref_id: user_ref.id,
  evaluated_at: 15.days.ago,
  evaluated_by_ref_id: user_ref.id,
  evaluation_result: "positive",
  expired_at: 90.days.from_now
\)
puts "Created Technical RFI: #{technical_rfi.id} - Status: #{technical_rfi.status}"

# Create another Commercial RFI - In Progress \(not submitted\)
commercial_rfi2 = Pg::CommercialRfi.create!\(
  provider: provider,
  multipage_form_builder_id: builders[0].id,
  name: "Financial Assessment",
  created_by_ref_id: user_ref.id
\)
puts "Created Commercial RFI 2: #{commercial_rfi2.id} - Status: #{commercial_rfi2.status}"

# Create Compli RFI - Expired
compli_rfi2 = Pg::CompliRfi.create!\(
  provider: provider,
  multipage_form_builder_id: builders[1].id,
  name: "Regulatory Compliance Check",
  submitted_at: 100.days.ago,
  submitted_by_ref_id: user_ref.id,
  expired_at: 10.days.ago
\)
puts "Created Compli RFI 2: #{compli_rfi2.id} - Status: #{compli_rfi2.status}"

# Create additional RFIs from a second provider to show more variety
provider2 = Pg::Provider.offset\(1\).first
if provider2
  tech_rfi2 = Pg::TechnicalRfi.create!\(
    provider: provider2,
    multipage_form_builder_id: builders[2].id,
    name: "Laboratory Equipment Assessment",
    submitted_at: 5.days.ago,
    submitted_by_ref_id: user_ref.id
  \)
  puts "Created Technical RFI 2: #{tech_rfi2.id} - Status: #{tech_rfi2.status}"
end

puts "\\nReindexing..."
ProviderRfi.reindex

puts "\\nTotal RFIs created: #{ProviderRfi.count}"
RUBY_SCRIPT)

Bash(/tmp/fix_rfi_pages.rb << 'RUBY_SCRIPT' # Create a simple dynamic form for RFI pages dynamic_form = Pg::DynamicForm.create!\( name: "Sample RFI Form", default_renderer: "

{{company_name}}

Contact: {{contact_person}}

Email: {{email}}

Phone: {{phone}}

Compliance Status: {{compliance_status}}

Section 1 Answer: {{section_1_question_1}}

Section 2 Answer: {{section_1_question_2}}

" \) puts "Created dynamic form: #{dynamic_form.id} - #{dynamic_form.name}" # Associate it with all RFI pages Pg::FormPage.all.each do |page| # Create an embedded dynamic form for this page embedded_form = Pg::EmbeddedDynamicForm.create!\( dynamic_form_attachment: page.dynamic_form_attachment, parent_dynamic_form: dynamic_form, name: dynamic_form.name \) puts "Associated page #{page.id} with dynamic form" end puts "\\nDone! All pages now have dynamic forms." RUBY_SCRIPT)

Bash(/tmp/make_rfis_different.rb << 'RUBY_SCRIPT'
# Get RFIs 7 and 8
rfi7 = Pg::MultipageForm.find\(7\)  # COMPLi Assessment
rfi8 = Pg::MultipageForm.find\(8\)  # Technical Capabilities Assessment

puts "Updating RFI 7: #{rfi7.name}"
puts "Updating RFI 8: #{rfi8.name}"

# Make RFI 7 pages different
rfi7.pages.each_with_index do |page, i|
  page.dynamic_form_attachment.update!\(
    data: {
      "company_name" => "OLD COMPANY NAME - Beachside Bio",
      "contact_person" => "Jane Smith \(OLD\)",
      "email" => "old.email@beachside.com",
      "phone" => "+1-555-OLD#{i}",
      "section_#{i + 1}_question_1" => "OLD ANSWER: This is the original response from page #{i + 1}",
      "section_#{i + 1}_question_2" => "OLD DATA: Legacy information from previous submission",
      "compliance_status" => "No",
      "last_updated" => "2025-01-01"
    }
  \)
end

# Make RFI 8 pages different \(newer/updated version\)
rfi8.pages.each_with_index do |page, i|
  page.dynamic_form_attachment.update!\(
    data: {
      "company_name" => "NEW COMPANY NAME - Beachside Biotechnology Services",
      "contact_person" => "John Doe \(NEW - Updated Contact\)",
      "email" => "new.updated@beachside.com",
      "phone" => "+1-555-NEW#{i}",
      "section_#{i + 1}_question_1" => "NEW ANSWER: This is the updated response for page #{i + 1} with additional details",
      "section_#{i + 1}_question_2" => "UPDATED DATA: Revised information with new protocols and procedures",
      "compliance_status" => "Yes",
      "last_updated" => "2026-02-09"
    }
  \)
end

puts "\\nRFI 7 \(OLD version\):"
puts "  Contact: #{rfi7.pages.first.data['contact_person']}"
puts "  Status: #{rfi7.pages.first.data['compliance_status']}"

puts "\\nRFI 8 \(NEW version\):"
puts "  Contact: #{rfi8.pages.first.data['contact_person']}"
puts "  Status: #{rfi8.pages.first.data['compliance_status']}"

puts "\\nDone! RFIs now have different data to compare."
RUBY_SCRIPT)

Bash(/tmp/populate_rfis.rb << 'RUBY_SCRIPT'
# Add pages, questions and answers to RFIs
rfis = ProviderRfi.all

rfis.each do |rfi|
  # Create some form pages with sample data
  3.times do |page_num|
    page = rfi.pages.create!\(
      index: page_num
    \)
    
    # Add some questions to each page  
    2.times do |q_num|
      question = page.questions.create!\(
        index: q_num,
        body: "Question #{q_num + 1} for page #{page_num + 1}",
        question_type: 'text',
        required: true
      \)
      
      # Add an answer to the question
      question.answers.create!\(
        body: "Sample answer #{q_num + 1} for #{rfi.provider.name}"
      \)
    end
  end
  
  puts "Populated #{rfi.name} with 3 pages and 6 questions"
end

puts "\\nTotal pages created: #{Pg::FormPage.where\(multipage_form_id: rfis.pluck\(:id\)\).count}"
RUBY_SCRIPT)

Bash(/tmp/populate_rfis2.rb << 'RUBY_SCRIPT'
# Add sample data to RFI pages via dynamic_form_attachment
rfis = ProviderRfi.all

rfis.each do |rfi|
  # Clear any existing pages first
  rfi.pages.destroy_all
  
  # Create 3 pages with sample form data
  3.times do |page_num|
    page = rfi.pages.create!\(
      index: page_num,
      status: 'Complete'
    \)
    
    # Add form data to the page's dynamic_form_attachment
    page.dynamic_form_attachment.update!\(
      data: {
        "company_name" => rfi.provider.name,
        "contact_person" => "John Doe",
        "email" => "john.doe@#{rfi.provider.name.parameterize}.com",
        "phone" => "+1-555-0#{100 + page_num}",
        "section_#{page_num + 1}_question_1" => "This is a sample answer for section #{page_num + 1}",
        "section_#{page_num + 1}_question_2" => "Additional information provided by #{rfi.provider.name}",
        "compliance_status" => ["Yes", "No", "Partial"][page_num % 3],
        "last_updated" => Date.today.to_s
      }
    \)
  end
  
  puts "Populated #{rfi.name} \(#{rfi.provider.name}\) with 3 pages of form data"
end

puts "\\nDone! Total pages: #{Pg::FormPage.where\(multipage_form_id: rfis.pluck\(:id\)\).count}"
RUBY_SCRIPT)

Bash(/tmp/set_parent.rb << 'RUBY_SCRIPT'
rfi7 = Pg::MultipageForm.find\(7\)
rfi8 = Pg::MultipageForm.find\(8\)

puts 'Before:'
puts "  RFI 7 parent: #{rfi7.parent_multipage_form_id || 'none'}"
puts "  RFI 8 parent: #{rfi8.parent_multipage_form_id || 'none'}"

# Set RFI 7 as the parent of RFI 8
rfi8.update!\(parent_multipage_form_id: rfi7.id\)

puts "\\nAfter:"
puts "  RFI 8 now has RFI 7 as its parent"
puts "  RFI 8 parent_id: #{rfi8.reload.parent_multipage_form_id}"
RUBY_SCRIPT)

Bash(/tmp/update_embedded_forms.rb << 'RUBY_SCRIPT'
# Get the parent dynamic form
parent_form = Pg::DynamicForm.find_by\(name: 'Sample RFI Form'\)

puts "Parent form backoffice_renderer exists: #{!parent_form.backoffice_renderer.nil?}"

# Find all embedded forms that reference this parent
embedded_forms = Pg::EmbeddedDynamicForm.where\(parent_dynamic_form_id: parent_form.id\)

puts "Found #{embedded_forms.count} embedded forms to update"

embedded_forms.each do |embedded|
  # Copy the properties from parent to embedded
  embedded.update!\(
    backoffice_renderer: parent_form.backoffice_renderer,
    default_renderer: parent_form.default_renderer,
    schema: parent_form.schema,
    options: parent_form.options
  \)
  puts "  Updated embedded form #{embedded.id}"
end

puts "\\nDone! All embedded forms now have the renderer."
RUBY_SCRIPT)

Bash(cat /Users/mike/design_docs/quote_group_auto_document/az_config_rules.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)

# Show all active rules with their description and configured_actions
print\('=== ACTIVE RULES ==='\)
for i, r in enumerate\(data\):
    if r.get\('active'\):
        desc = r.get\('description', 'No description'\)
        actions = r.get\('configured_actions', []\)
        directives = [d.get\('type'\) for d in r.get\('directives', []\)]
        print\(f'[{i}] {desc}'\)
        print\(f'     Actions: {actions}'\)
        print\(f'     Directives: {directives}'\)
        print\(\)
")

Bash(cat /Users/mike/design_docs/quote_group_auto_document/az_config_rules.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Total rules: {len\(data\)}'\)
print\(\)
# Show unique target classes
classes = set\(r.get\('target_class'\) for r in data\)
print\('Target classes:', classes\)
print\(\)
# Show active vs inactive
active = sum\(1 for r in data if r.get\('active'\)\)
inactive = sum\(1 for r in data if not r.get\('active'\)\)
print\(f'Active: {active}, Inactive: {inactive}'\)
print\(\)
# Show unique configured_actions
actions = set\(\)
for r in data:
    for a in r.get\('configured_actions', []\):
        actions.add\(a\)
print\('Configured actions:', sorted\(actions\)\)
print\(\)
# Show unique directive types
dtypes = set\(\)
for r in data:
    for d in r.get\('directives', []\):
        dtypes.add\(d.get\('type'\)\)
print\('Directive types:', dtypes\)
print\(\)
# Show unique criterion types
ctypes = set\(\)
for r in data:
    for c in r.get\('criteria', []\):
        ctypes.add\(c.get\('type'\)\)
print\('Criterion types:', ctypes\)
")

hooks.command:
T1="$HOME/skills/plugins/mguerrero8816/rules/t1-sacred" && T2="$HOME/skills/plugins/mguerrero8816/rules/t2-standards" && T3="$HOME/skills/plugins/mguerrero8816/rules/t3-preferences" && T4="$HOME/skills/plugins/mguerrero8816/rules/t4-defaults" && CL="$HOME/rx/CLAUDE.local.md" && { awk '/<!-- SACRED_RULES_INJECTION_POINT -->/{print;exit}{print}' "$CL" && printf "
" && cat "$T1/01-no-remote-environments.md" && printf "
---

" && cat "$T1/02-no-unauthorized-git-ops.md" && printf "
---

" && cat "$T1/03-no-unauthorized-github-changes.md" && printf "
---

" && cat "$T1/04-no-unsolicited-code-changes.md" && printf "
---

" && cat "$T1/06-route-rules-to-skills.md" && printf "
---

" && printf "
---

# T2 — Standards (Always On)

" && for f in "$T2"/*.md; do cat "$f" && printf "
---

"; done && printf "# T3 — Preferences (Personal Style)

" && for f in "$T3"/*.md; do cat "$f" && printf "
---

"; done && printf "# T4 — Defaults (Soft)

" && for f in "$T4"/*.md; do cat "$f" && printf "
---

"; done; } > /tmp/claude_local_tmp.md && mv /tmp/claude_local_tmp.md "$CL" 2>/dev/null || true
